summary: Completed testing of 1v1 CinePass battle reward fix and UI improvements. All key fixes verified working - offline battles now correctly give +2 CinePass, UI shows production_house_name, film grid deduplication works, and poster/trailer fallbacks are in place.

1v1_offline_battle_cinepass_reward.details: Battle API correctly returns cinepass_reward field. Winner receives +2 CinePass. Backend uses 'total_xp' instead of 'xp' (root cause fix). Verified via pytest and API testing.

cinepass_display_navbar.details: CinePass balance (144) displayed correctly in navbar with cyan badge and ticket icon

production_house_name_welcome.details: Welcome message shows 'Anacapito Studio's' (production_house_name) instead of nickname

production_house_name_dropdown.details: Profile dropdown shows 'Anacapito Studio's' as primary name with 'NeoMorpheus' as secondary nickname

film_deduplication.details: Dashboard film grid shows unique films without duplicates. Backend test confirmed no duplicate IDs.

poster_fallback.details: Dashboard.jsx line 432 has onError handler that sets fallback image to Unsplash cinema photo

trailer_error_handling.details: FilmDetail.jsx line 877 has onError handler that displays error message and allows regeneration

login_flow.details: Login with ACCEDI button works correctly, redirects to dashboard with welcome message

context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported bugs have been fixed and verified. 1v1 battle CinePass reward now works (root cause was using 'xp' instead of 'total_xp' in $inc). UI correctly shows production_house_name in welcome message and profile dropdown. Film deduplication, poster fallback, and trailer error handling all implemented correctly.

verified_fixes.1v1_cinepass_reward_bug: FIXED - Changed $inc field from 'xp' to 'total_xp' in server.py line 11664-11669 for offline battle and line 11314-11325 for online battle. Also added cinepass increment.
verified_fixes.production_house_name_display: FIXED - Dashboard.jsx line 236 uses production_house_name, App.js line 469 shows production_house_name in profile dropdown
verified_fixes.film_deduplication: FIXED - Dashboard.jsx line 197 deduplicates films by ID using Map
verified_fixes.poster_fallback: FIXED - Dashboard.jsx line 432 has onError fallback
verified_fixes.trailer_error_handling: FIXED - FilmDetail.jsx line 873-879 has video onError handler
